research_objective: Evaluate how different prompting strategies influence the preservation of Information Integrity and Cultural Fidelity during AI-assisted information transformation.
research_question: How do different prompt variants affect Information Integrity and Cultural Fidelity failure patterns when applied to the same benchmark documents across multiple language models?
hypothesis: Prompt variants explicitly designed to preserve source fidelity will reduce context omission, attribution errors, and Cultural Fidelity failures compared with more general prompting strategies.
experiment_rationale: This experiment holds the benchmark corpus, transformation task, judge methodology, and model roster constant while varying only the prompt strategy.

transformation_task.name: Faithful Transformation
transformation_task.instructions: Produce a concise professional summary while preserving factual accuracy, attribution, chronology, uncertainty, competing perspectives, and culturally significant context.
